title: IMU FFT Vibration Anomaly Detector
description: Machine health monitor sampling ICM-42688-P Z-axis accelerometer at 1 kHz, running 64-point fixed-point FFT each 64 ms window, detecting dominant frequency anomalies via adaptive EMA threshold, alerting via BLE, and indicating status with a tri-colour LED.
objective: Detect dominant vibration anomalies exceeding 2.5× EMA baseline within 3 consecutive windows; send BLE JSON alert; log spectrum at 1 Hz via UART.
constraints: Arduino Mega; ICM-42688-P SPI CS=10; HM-10 BLE on Serial1; 64-sample window; FFT must complete in <2 ms.
supporting_fact_titles: Fixed-Point FFT for Embedded Vibration Analysis

element_usage_notes.ICM-42688-P High-Rate IMU via SPI: Samples Z-axis accel at 1 kHz; 64-sample buffer fills in 64 ms for FFT.
element_usage_notes.64-Point Q15 FFT Engine: Transforms 64 accel samples to frequency domain; fft_peak_bin returns dominant bin.
element_usage_notes.Adaptive RMS Anomaly Threshold: EMA baseline updated each window; alarm confirmed after 3 consecutive exceedances.
element_usage_notes.HM-10 BLE Alert Transmitter: JSON alert to mobile app on confirmed anomaly; heartbeat every 5 s.
element_usage_notes.Tri-Colour Vibration Status LED: GREEN/AMBER/RED per anomaly decision each window.

element_interactions.description: IMU fills sample buffer; FFT processes when window completes.
FFT dominant bin magnitude fed to EMA comparator each window.
BLE JSON alert sent on confirmed anomaly after 3 windows.
LED colour updated per anomaly decision each 64 ms window.
